offer: For property managers handling 5–15 lease agreements/month, missed lease payment deadlines cause late fees and tenant dissatisfaction. We provide alerts instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
problem: Missed lease payment deadlines leading to late fees and tenant dissatisfaction.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers seeking solutions
Indie Hackers discussions on similar property management workflows
DM outreach to property managers with a demo video
Community forums where property managers share tools and tips
try_it: Let users try payment reminders and a dashboard for tracking
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the offer and CTA
Produce a demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy reuse
Set default reminder schedules for convenience
Allow CSV import for existing lease data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
